---
title: Projects
description: |
    Research projects spanning registry-based epidemiology, methodological innovation, and open-source tools
---

Our lab is involved in a variety of research projects spanning multiple disciplines.

```{=html}
<div class="project-filters">
  <div class="filter-group">
    <span class="filter-label">Status:</span>
    <button class="filter-btn filter-status active" data-filter="all" data-group="status">All</button>
    <button class="filter-btn filter-status" data-filter="Ongoing" data-group="status">Ongoing</button>
    <button class="filter-btn filter-status" data-filter="Completed" data-group="status">Completed</button>
  </div>
  <div class="filter-group">
    <span class="filter-label">Topic:</span>
    <button class="filter-btn filter-topic active" data-filter="all" data-group="topic">All</button>
    <button class="filter-btn filter-topic" data-filter="Methods" data-group="topic">Methods</button>
    <button class="filter-btn filter-topic" data-filter="Epidemiology" data-group="topic">Epidemiology</button>
    <button class="filter-btn filter-topic" data-filter="Open-source tools" data-group="topic">Open-source tools</button>
    <button class="filter-btn filter-topic" data-filter="Registry studies" data-group="topic">Registry studies</button>
    <button class="filter-btn filter-topic" data-filter="Clinical outcomes" data-group="topic">Clinical outcomes</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

:::{.project-card data-status="Ongoing" data-topics='["Methods","Open-source tools"]'}

```{=html}
<h3 style="margin-bottom: 0.5rem;"><a href="projects/swereg.html">swereg R package</a></h3>
<span class="status-badge">Ongoing</span>
```

We develop and maintain [swereg](https://papadopoulos-lab.github.io/swereg/), an R package for analyzing Swedish healthcare registry data.

<span class="listing-tags">Methods</span> <span class="listing-tags">Open-source tools</span>

[Read more →](projects/swereg.html)

:::

:::{.project-card data-status="Ongoing" data-topics='["Epidemiology","Registry studies"]'}

```{=html}
<h3 style="margin-bottom: 0.5rem;"><a href="projects/population-studies.html">Population Studies</a></h3>
<span class="status-badge">Ongoing</span>
```

Registry-based studies examining population dynamics and epidemiological patterns in Swedish healthcare data.

<span class="listing-tags">Epidemiology</span> <span class="listing-tags">Registry studies</span>

[Read more →](projects/population-studies.html)

:::

:::{.project-card data-status="Ongoing" data-topics='["Methods","Epidemiology","Clinical outcomes"]'}

```{=html}
<h3 style="margin-bottom: 0.5rem;"><a href="projects/registry-trajectories.html">Registry Trajectories</a></h3>
<span class="status-badge">Ongoing</span>
```

Developing novel analytical approaches for studying care trajectories and patient pathways in Swedish healthcare registries.

<span class="listing-tags">Methods</span> <span class="listing-tags">Clinical outcomes</span>

[Read more →](projects/registry-trajectories.html)

:::

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.project-card');
  let activeStatus = 'all';
  let activeTopic = 'all';

  function applyFilters() {
    cards.forEach(card => {
      const statusMatch = activeStatus === 'all' || card.dataset.status === activeStatus;
      const topics = JSON.parse(card.dataset.topics || '[]');
      const topicMatch = activeTopic === 'all' || topics.includes(activeTopic);
      card.style.display = (statusMatch && topicMatch) ? '' : 'none';
    });
  }

  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-status').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      document.querySelectorAll('.filter-status').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
      activeStatus = btn.dataset.filter;
      btn.classList.add('active');
      applyFilters();
    });
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-topic').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      document.querySelectorAll('.filter-topic').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
      activeTopic = btn.dataset.filter;
      btn.classList.add('active');
      applyFilters();
    });
  });
})();
</script>
```
